jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Columbia Asia
jsonLd.description:
Columbia Asia has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
